title: Too Many Explosives
body:
This Mod adds in a lot of ezplisive equipment, complete with detonators

It also adds
---
- Dynamite
- Crate TNTs
- New Villager Profession.

What the future holds
---
This Mod is far from finished, and we will add more things to it. Just keep in Mind that it is not easy to make Bugfixes, we will try to fix bugs that are noticed by us.

We hope you enjoy!
